channel.title: 中国日报-生活
channel.description: 中国日报-生活 RSS Feed

item.title: Nazi hunters' first show opens at a French memorial
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: PARISï¼Their heroic quest to bring down fugitive Nazis such as the "butcher of Lyon" is widely known. But there's a lot more to the steely, yet unassuming, married duo of Nazi hunters Beate and Serge Klarsfeld, and a new exhibition in Paris is looking to tell that tale.

item.title: Nazi hunters' first show opens at a French memorial
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: PARISï¼Their heroic quest to bring down fugitive Nazis such as the "butcher of Lyon" is widely known. But there's a lot more to the steely, yet unassuming, married duo of Nazi hunters Beate and Serge Klarsfeld, and a new exhibition in Paris is looking to tell that tale.

item.title: Nazi hunters' first show opens at a French memorial
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: PARISï¼Their heroic quest to bring down fugitive Nazis such as the "butcher of Lyon" is widely known. But there's a lot more to the steely, yet unassuming, married duo of Nazi hunters Beate and Serge Klarsfeld, and a new exhibition in Paris is looking to tell that tale.

item.title: Lantern show with fishing theme opens in Harbin
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: On Saturday, thousands of lanterns began to be displayed in a lantern show, an important part of the Changling Lake Winter Ice Fishing Festival in Harbin, the capital city of Heilongjiang province.

item.title: Lantern show with fishing theme opens in Harbin
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: On Saturday, thousands of lanterns began to be displayed in a lantern show, an important part of the Changling Lake Winter Ice Fishing Festival in Harbin, the capital city of Heilongjiang province.

item.title: Lantern show with fishing theme opens in Harbin
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: On Saturday, thousands of lanterns began to be displayed in a lantern show, an important part of the Changling Lake Winter Ice Fishing Festival in Harbin, the capital city of Heilongjiang province.

item.title: Lantern show with fishing theme opens in Harbin
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: On Saturday, thousands of lanterns began to be displayed in a lantern show, an important part of the Changling Lake Winter Ice Fishing Festival in Harbin, the capital city of Heilongjiang province.

item.title: Lantern show with fishing theme opens in Harbin
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: On Saturday, thousands of lanterns began to be displayed in a lantern show, an important part of the Changling Lake Winter Ice Fishing Festival in Harbin, the capital city of Heilongjiang province.

item.title: <em>Paddington 2</em> gains at China box office
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Paddington 2, the live-action, animated sequel featuring the titular bear, has had a successful weekend since it arrived in Chinese theaters on Friday.

item.title: From milk bath to fruit bath, Hebei county offers unique experiences
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Due to a large coverage and storage of subterranean heat, Longhua county boasts a rich deposit of hot spring resources. As the weather gets colder, local hot spring scenic areas launch a wide array of bathing experiences, such as forest bath, fruit bath, milk bath, etc.

item.title: From milk bath to fruit bath, Hebei county offers unique experiences
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Due to a large coverage and storage of subterranean heat, Longhua county boasts a rich deposit of hot spring resources. As the weather gets colder, local hot spring scenic areas launch a wide array of bathing experiences, such as forest bath, fruit bath, milk bath, etc.

item.title: From milk bath to fruit bath, Hebei county offers unique experiences
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Due to a large coverage and storage of subterranean heat, Longhua county boasts a rich deposit of hot spring resources. As the weather gets colder, local hot spring scenic areas launch a wide array of bathing experiences, such as forest bath, fruit bath, milk bath, etc.

item.title: From milk bath to fruit bath, Hebei county offers unique experiences
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Due to a large coverage and storage of subterranean heat, Longhua county boasts a rich deposit of hot spring resources. As the weather gets colder, local hot spring scenic areas launch a wide array of bathing experiences, such as forest bath, fruit bath, milk bath, etc.

item.title: Exhibition takes closer look at jewelry design
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: The 2017 Bazaar Jewelry International Designer Salon takes place at Beijing's trendy 751 D Park area from Dec 8 to 11.

item.title: Exhibition takes closer look at jewelry design
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: The 2017 Bazaar Jewelry International Designer Salon takes place at Beijing's trendy 751 D Park area from Dec 8 to 11.

item.title: Chinese tourists visiting Philippines up 35 pct in first 11 months
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Data from the Philippine Bureau of Immigration (BI) showed that nearly 800,000 Chinese tourists entered the Philippines from January to November this year, increasing 35 percent on-year, local media reported on Sunday.

item.title: Chinese tourists visiting Philippines up 35 pct in first 11 months
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Data from the Philippine Bureau of Immigration (BI) showed that nearly 800,000 Chinese tourists entered the Philippines from January to November this year, increasing 35 percent on-year, local media reported on Sunday.

item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Data from the Philippine Bureau of Immigration (BI) showed that nearly 800,000 Chinese tourists entered the Philippines from January to November this year, increasing 35 percent on-year, local media reported on Sunday.

item.description: Data from the Philippine Bureau of Immigration (BI) showed that nearly 800,000 Chinese tourists entered the Philippines from January to November this year, increasing 35 percent on-year, local media reported on Sunday.

item.title: Scenery of Danjiangkou Reservoir in Central China's Henan
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Danjiangkou Reservoir is the water source of the central route of China's south-to-north water diversion project.

item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Aerial view of pond cypresses at Qingxi Country Park in Qingpu district, Shanghai, China, December 9, 2017.

item.title: Actress Yang Caiyu releases fashion photos
item.author: 中国日报-生活

item.title: Actress Yang Caiyu releases fashion photos

item.description: Actress Yang Caiyu releases several fashion photos. [Photo/IC]

item.title: Let a plaid shirt highlight your winter look
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: For those who prefer to wear many layers of clothes, winter would be the best time to experiment with your wardrobe. One popular way is to wear a plaid shirt between the overcoat and jumper. If you are in head-to âtoe dark colors, a plaid shirt in bold tones can be added to liven your look.

item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: For those who prefer to wear many layers of clothes, winter would be the best time to experiment with your wardrobe. One popular way is to wear a plaid shirt between the overcoat and jumper. If you are in head-to âtoe dark colors, a plaid shirt in bold tones can be added to liven your look.

One popular way is to wear a plaid shirt between the overcoat and jumper. If you are in head-to âtoe dark colors, a plaid shirt in bold tones can be added to liven your look.

item.title: Dapper days of a solemn gentleman
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: The solemn gentleman sits in front of the fireplace, tumbler of whisky in hand, contemplating his well-travelled life of eccentricities â and his next move.

item.title: Living the dream on frozen ice
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: An Alpine ski event like no other stealthily and spectacularly makes its way to St Moritz in February

item.title: Picture perfect: A photo album on Brazil
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Their lenses record a country full of wondersï¼from the giant statue of Christ the Redeemer to Iguazu Falls, the world's widest waterfall; and from the mysterious Amazon forests to the simple but marvelous architecture of the Cathedral of Brasilia.

item.title: Picture perfect: A photo album on Brazil
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Their lenses record a country full of wondersï¼from the giant statue of Christ the Redeemer to Iguazu Falls, the world's widest waterfall; and from the mysterious Amazon forests to the simple but marvelous architecture of the Cathedral of Brasilia.

item.title: Picture perfect: A photo album on Brazil
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Their lenses record a country full of wondersï¼from the giant statue of Christ the Redeemer to Iguazu Falls, the world's widest waterfall; and from the mysterious Amazon forests to the simple but marvelous architecture of the Cathedral of Brasilia.

item.title: Picture perfect: A photo album on Brazil
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Their lenses record a country full of wondersï¼from the giant statue of Christ the Redeemer to Iguazu Falls, the world's widest waterfall; and from the mysterious Amazon forests to the simple but marvelous architecture of the Cathedral of Brasilia.

item.title: Chinese tourist arrivals to Sri Lanka record 3.5 pct growth in November
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Chinese tourist arrivals to Sri Lanka witnessed a 3.5 percent growth last month when compared to the same period last year, with over 19,200 visitors arriving in the island country, statistics from the Sri Lanka Tourism Ministry showed here Thursday.

item.title: Chinese tourist arrivals to Sri Lanka record 3.5 pct growth in November
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Chinese tourist arrivals to Sri Lanka witnessed a 3.5 percent growth last month when compared to the same period last year, with over 19,200 visitors arriving in the island country, statistics from the Sri Lanka Tourism Ministry showed here Thursday.

item.title: Chinese tourist arrivals to Sri Lanka record 3.5 pct growth in November
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Chinese tourist arrivals to Sri Lanka witnessed a 3.5 percent growth last month when compared to the same period last year, with over 19,200 visitors arriving in the island country, statistics from the Sri Lanka Tourism Ministry showed here Thursday.

item.title: Smart fitness equipment makes exercise more fun, convenient in NW China city
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: According to officials of the Zhongshan Park, this "Fitness Pavilion" is the first smart fitness route in this city and contains four pieces of equipment, and was set up two weeks ago.

item.title: Indonesia eyes China's Macao, Hong Kong markets to boost tourism
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Indonesia has planned to hold events to sell tour packages in China's Macao and Hong Kong on Dec 12 and Dec 14 respectively, aimed at further tapping significant potentialities from the two markets, a senior official of the country's Tourism Ministry said.

item.title: Indonesia eyes China's Macao, Hong Kong markets to boost tourism
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Indonesia has planned to hold events to sell tour packages in China's Macao and Hong Kong on Dec 12 and Dec 14 respectively, aimed at further tapping significant potentialities from the two markets, a senior official of the country's Tourism Ministry said.

item.title: Indonesia eyes China's Macao, Hong Kong markets to boost tourism
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Indonesia has planned to hold events to sell tour packages in China's Macao and Hong Kong on Dec 12 and Dec 14 respectively, aimed at further tapping significant potentialities from the two markets, a senior official of the country's Tourism Ministry said.

item.title: Indonesia eyes China's Macao, Hong Kong markets to boost tourism
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Indonesia has planned to hold events to sell tour packages in China's Macao and Hong Kong on Dec 12 and Dec 14 respectively, aimed at further tapping significant potentialities from the two markets, a senior official of the country's Tourism Ministry said.

item.title: Clinical skill contest attracts over 100 overseas students in Tianjin
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: International students from Tianjin Medical University conduct lumbar puncture during a clinical skill contest for overseas students held at Tianjin Medical University in North China's Tianjin municipality, Dec 9, 2017.

item.title: Clinical skill contest attracts over 100 overseas students in Tianjin
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: International students from Tianjin Medical University conduct lumbar puncture during a clinical skill contest for overseas students held at Tianjin Medical University in North China's Tianjin municipality, Dec 9, 2017.

item.title: 2017 Miss Chinese Vancouver Pageant held in Canada
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Contestants perform on stage during the 2017 Miss Chinese Vancouver Pageant in Vancouver, Canada, Dec 8, 2017.

item.title: 2017 Miss Chinese Vancouver Pageant held in Canada
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Contestants perform on stage during the 2017 Miss Chinese Vancouver Pageant in Vancouver, Canada, Dec 8, 2017.

item.title: 2017 Miss Chinese Vancouver Pageant held in Canada
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Contestants perform on stage during the 2017 Miss Chinese Vancouver Pageant in Vancouver, Canada, Dec 8, 2017.

item.title: Aerial photos show houses with Miao characteristics in SW China
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: The Qianhu Miao village has more than 1,200 wooden Diaojiaolou, or houses on stilts, built on hills with particular Miao characteristics, making it China's largest and most typical Diaojiaolou stockaded village of the Miao ethnic group.

item.title: Aerial photos show houses with Miao characteristics in SW China
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: The Qianhu Miao village has more than 1,200 wooden Diaojiaolou, or houses on stilts, built on hills with particular Miao characteristics, making it China's largest and most typical Diaojiaolou stockaded village of the Miao ethnic group.

item.title: Aerial photos show houses with Miao characteristics in SW China
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: The Qianhu Miao village has more than 1,200 wooden Diaojiaolou, or houses on stilts, built on hills with particular Miao characteristics, making it China's largest and most typical Diaojiaolou stockaded village of the Miao ethnic group.

item.title: Listings
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Listings

item.title: Smell danger by reading the lead
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Elizabeth Taylor said, "Success is a great deodorant. It takes away all your past smells."

item.title: Best bets
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Based on the adored Metro-Goldwyn-Mayer hit movie, "Legally Blonde: The Broadway Musical" is a fabulously fun international award-winning musical that follows the transformation of Elle Woods as she tackles stereotypes, snobbery, and scandal in pursuit of her dreams.

item.title: Coffee with â¦ Anais Mak
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: The 28-year-old founder of fashion label Jourden was raised in Hong Kong, trained at Paris fashion design institute Studio BerÃ§ot, then came back to start her own brand. With her clothes sold in well-known department stores across the globe (including Barneys, Lane Crawford and Le Bon MarchÃ©), the LVMH Prize finalist recently designed a game app for one of her favourite Parisian retailers, Colette.

item.title: Coffee with â¦ Anais Mak
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: The 28-year-old founder of fashion label Jourden was raised in Hong Kong, trained at Paris fashion design institute Studio BerÃ§ot, then came back to start her own brand. With her clothes sold in well-known department stores across the globe (including Barneys, Lane Crawford and Le Bon MarchÃ©), the LVMH Prize finalist recently designed a game app for one of her favourite Parisian retailers, Colette.

item.title: Scents from the maze
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: World-renowned French perfumer Serge Lutens unlocks his enigmatic labyrinth of inspiration and creation in this exclusive interview with China Daily Lifestyle Premium.

item.title: Scents from the maze
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: World-renowned French perfumer Serge Lutens unlocks his enigmatic labyrinth of inspiration and creation in this exclusive interview with China Daily Lifestyle Premium.

item.title: Scents from the maze
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: World-renowned French perfumer Serge Lutens unlocks his enigmatic labyrinth of inspiration and creation in this exclusive interview with China Daily Lifestyle Premium.

item.title: Scents from the maze
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: World-renowned French perfumer Serge Lutens unlocks his enigmatic labyrinth of inspiration and creation in this exclusive interview with China Daily Lifestyle Premium.

item.title: Play focuses on classic painting and its creator
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: The work, Dwelling in the Fuchun Mountains, which was painted nearly 700 years ago by acclaimed painter of the Yuan Dynasty (1271-1368) Huang Gongwang (1269-1354), is regarded as one of the 10 top masterpieces in Chinese art history.

item.title: Backstage experiences
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: A German theater company has started its China tour with a wordless play.

item.title: Chinese investment leads oldest Czech soccer team to championship
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: When an old football team of the Czech Republic, which nearly went bankrupt two years ago, revitalized and won a championship this year with the help of Chinese investment, there was a big sensation.

item.title: Chinese investment leads oldest Czech soccer team to championship
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: When an old football team of the Czech Republic, which nearly went bankrupt two years ago, revitalized and won a championship this year with the help of Chinese investment, there was a big sensation.

item.title: Chinese investment leads oldest Czech soccer team to championship
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: When an old football team of the Czech Republic, which nearly went bankrupt two years ago, revitalized and won a championship this year with the help of Chinese investment, there was a big sensation.

item.title: 'China, I like it': A Polish young man's ambition to bridge cultures
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: In Poland, the ever closer economic relationship with China has sparked people's interest in learning about a country more than 6,600 kilometers away, and many turn to a popular website named Chinytolubie, Polish for "China, I like it."

item.title: 'China, I like it': A Polish young man's ambition to bridge cultures
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: In Poland, the ever closer economic relationship with China has sparked people's interest in learning about a country more than 6,600 kilometers away, and many turn to a popular website named Chinytolubie, Polish for "China, I like it."

item.title: Tireless performer
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: For Chinese dancer-choreographer Chen Ailian, who is nearing 80, age is just a number.

item.title: Tireless performer
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: For Chinese dancer-choreographer Chen Ailian, who is nearing 80, age is just a number.

item.title: Tireless performer
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: For Chinese dancer-choreographer Chen Ailian, who is nearing 80, age is just a number.

item.title: A history of male beauty in China
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Before the Wei Kingdom (220-265) in China, the concept of men's beauty had little to do with outward appearances. Instead it was largely focused on the Confucian philosophy of being a junzi, a man who is noble and honorable.

item.title: A history of male beauty in China
item.author: 中国日报-生活
item.description: Before the Wei Kingdom (220-265) in China, the concept of men's beauty had little to do with outward appearances. Instead it was largely focused on the Confucian philosophy of being a junzi, a man who is noble and honorable.
